content: User approved the next step after a likely multi-page crash pattern was identified. Next action is to harden ninoscreens multi-page navigation and focus logic so tiles on non-visible pages are not manuplated in a fragile way during page switches, memory refreshes, or focus transitions.

User approved continuing after the multi-page stability patch. Next action is to validate the current ninoscreens branch files for syntax and consistency, identify any remaining fragile paths in multi-page navigation or matrix memory updates, and harden the code without destabilizing the new 3-pages-plus-RUN foundation.

User uploaded the local ninoscreens ZIP for validation. Next action is to extract the archive, inspect the critical Python files, and run syntax and structure checks so the user gets an exact status of what is sound and what still needs repair.

User uploaded a second ZIP after the first archive turned out to be a session handoff rather than the code repository. Next action is to extract and validate this new archive as the candidate ninoscreens repo and report the exact code health status.
